2605.23409.title: Online Hand Gesture Recognition Using 3D Convolutional Neural Networks
2605.23409.paper_summary: In human computer interaction, real-time detection and classification of dynamic hand gestures is challenging as: 1) the system must run in a real-time video stream and there is no noticeable lag in response after performing a gesture; 2) there is a large difference in how people perform gestures, making recognition more difficult. In this paper, an online hand gesture recognition system is proposed, which is able to localize gestures in real-time video stream and recognize what these gestures are. To improve the robustness of the system, the sliding window approach is used to refine results from multiple windows. All of the models in my project are trained on Jester database, achieving 98+% accuracy for detector and 90+% accuracy for classifier. For the overall performance of the system, the best group can respond within three seconds and reach 37.5% Levenshtein accuracy on the homemade dataset. The project codes used in this work are publicly available.
2605.23409.paper_summary_zh: 在人體計算機互動中，實時檢測和分類動態手勢是具有挑戰性的，因為：1）系統必須在實時視頻流中運行，並且在執行手勢後沒有明顯的延遲反應；2）人們執行手勢的方式差異很大，這使得識別變得更加困難。本文提出了一種在線手勢識別系統，能夠在實時視頻流中定位手勢並識別這些手勢是什麼。為了提高系統的穩健性，採用了滑動窗口方法來細化來自多個窗口的結果。我的項目中的所有模型都是在Jester數據庫上訓練的，檢測器的準確率達到98%以上，分類器的準確率達到90%以上。對於系統的整體性能，最佳組別能在三秒內做出反應，並在自製數據集上達到37.5%的Levenshtein準確率。本研究中使用的項目代碼是公開可用的。
2605.23409.author: Yinghao Qin et.al.
